notes: Free people-search site with a notably sketchy operational profile. Correct result: HIGH (68). Score breakdown: people_search_site(+20) + privacy_registrar(+8) + discount_registrar(+5) + dv_cert_only(+5) + cloudflare_proxy(+5) + platform_mismatch(+10) + cert_expiring_soon(+15) = 68. This matches lookups.io exactly. The cert has 38 days to expiry — under the 45-day threshold — indicating the operator is not renewing promptly (unusual for a legitimate high-traffic service with Let's Encrypt auto-renewal available). Free model with no subscription barrier, Porkbun registrar, Magento on a people-search site, and imminent cert expiry combine to paint a high-risk profile. WHOIS privacy via Contact Privacy Inc. (Tucows subsidiary).

metadata.title: Fast People Search - Free People Finder & Reverse Phone Lookup
metadata.description: Free people search and reverse phone lookup. Find contact information, address history, and public records instantly.
